item.title: Summer fete preview
item.description: Saving this for next summer. Hugo will not publish until the date arrives.

item.title: Summer Fete
item.description:
Our annual Summer Fete on the Hut grounds — bouncy castle, BBQ, raffle, plus a chance for parents to meet the leadership team and learn about the year ahead.

Volunteers welcome — get in touch if you can help with the BBQ or the gates rota.

item.title: District Camp 2026 — heads up
item.description: Save the date for District Camp at Gilwell-on-Sea. Booking opens next month.

item.title: St George's Day Parade
item.description: The whole Group turned out for our annual St George’s Day Parade — fresh neckers, polished shoes, and a piper to lead us in.

item.title: Cubs Cooking Cup 2026
item.description: Six teams. Three courses. One champion. Notes from the most-contested Cooking Cup the Pack has ever seen.

item.title: Squirrels start in September
item.description: We’re delighted to announce that 1st Anytown will open a Squirrel Drey from September. Details on joining and how to express interest below.
